subcodes.first_line: O esteemed being, your blessed letter was perused, which was addressed to the honourable governor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذات محترم نامه مبارک شما ملاحظه گردید خطاب به والی محترم بستن
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
